Review this pull request and provide concise, actionable feedback.

Focus on:
- Correctness and behavioral regressions
- Security and data leakage risks
- Reliability and error handling gaps
- Missing or weak tests for changed behavior

Response format:
- Start with `No blocking issues found.` if there are no critical/high issues.
- Otherwise list findings ordered by severity (`P0`, `P1`, `P2`).
- For each finding include:
  - A short title
  - Why it matters
  - A concrete suggestion to fix
  - File path(s) and line number(s) when possible

Keep the review brief and specific to the diff.
